patch.value: pm update --blocked-by does not create a pm deps graph edge

Dogfood 2026-05-22 HIGH: pm update <id> --blocked-by pm-X stores blocked_by metadata but creates no edge in pm deps (edge_count:0). Agents that record blockers via the documented --blocked-by flag get an empty dependency graph and wrong what-is-blocking-me answers. Fix: have --blocked-by also create a blocks/blocked-by dependency edge (or unify the two concepts), so metadata and graph agree.

author: claude-code-agent
message: Implementing update --blocked-by deps-edge symmetry with create.ts (pm-uz25 step 1).

value.author: claude-code-agent
value.text: FIXED (pm-uz25 step 1). Root cause: pm deps builds the graph only from the dependencies[] array, but update.ts --blocked-by wrote only the scalar blocked_by field (create.ts already added the edge; update.ts was asymmetric). Fix in src/cli/commands/update.ts: (1) new reconcileBlockedByDependency() helper; (2) resolve the --blocked-by target via locateItem before the synchronous mutate callback; (3) in the blocked_by mutate block, add a {kind:'blocked_by'} dependency edge when the target resolves, remove it on --unset blocked-by, and replace the stale edge on repoint. Verified by manual temp-dir smoke (edge_count 1->0) and 3 regression tests in update-command.spec.ts. update.ts is coverage-excluded so the 100% gate is unaffected.

patch.value: Fixed and merged (PR #45, commits 993584e7/d4b1748a/316284ef). reconcileBlockedByDependency() in src/cli/commands/update.ts now adds a {kind:'blocked_by'} dependency edge when --blocked-by resolves, removes it on --unset, and replaces stale edges on repoint — symmetric with create.ts. Re-verified 2026-05-23 in isolated temp project (build 2026.5.23): `update B --blocked-by A` then `deps B` reports edge_count:1 with via:"blocked_by"; deps tree shows the A dependency. Metadata and graph now agree. Closing as resolved.

Made update.ts --blocked-by symmetric with create.ts via reconcileBlockedByDependency(): resolve the target with locateItem, then add/remove/replace a {kind:'blocked_by'} edge in dependencies[] so pm deps and the scalar blocked_by metadata agree. Shipped in PR #45.
pm update <id> --blocked-by <target> records both the blocked_by metadata and a pm deps graph edge (edge_count >= 1, via 'blocked_by'); --unset blocked-by removes the edge.

Before the fix, update --blocked-by wrote only the scalar blocked_by field and pm deps reported edge_count:0, giving agents an empty dependency graph. After the fix, edge_count:1 with via:'blocked_by' (re-verified 2026-05-23).
